name: Kalbssxhnitzel in Currysosse (Veal Steaks / Lemon & Curry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season veal with salt, pepper and 1/2 teaspoon curry powder.
2. Heat oil in a pan; brown veal slices on both sides. Remove meat and set aside.
3. Add onions to the same pan and sauté until softened.
4. Stir in evaporated milk and tomato paste. Cook until bubbly.
5. Add lemon juice, remaining curry powder, and chopped parsley sprigs.
6. Return veal slices to the sauce.
7. Add cognac or brandy; heat through.
8. Serve on a preheated platter.
